scripts.serve: set -a; [ -f ../.env ] && . ../.env; set +a; npm run build && JDK21="$HOME/.local/jdks/temurin-21.0.8"; if [ -x "$JDK21/bin/java" ]; then export JAVA_HOME="$JDK21"; export PATH="$JDK21/bin:$PATH"; fi; npx --yes firebase-tools emulators:start --config ../firebase.json --project demo-hnas --only auth,firestore,functions
scripts.deploy: set -a; [ -f ../.env ] && . ../.env; set +a; npm run build && npx --yes firebase-tools deploy --config ../firebase.json --only functions
